text: While some reviews suggest a potential for modest pain relief or improved patient global impression of change [29513392, 41548880], other high-level evidence indicates no clear effect on substantial pain relief (≥50%) for THC-dominant, balanced THC/CBD, or CBD-dominant medicines [41548880].

text: Cannabinoids may increase the risk of nervous system and psychiatric adverse events, as well as treatment discontinuation due to side effects [41548880, 35510826, 29513392].
